BUDGET.label: Pricing, Cost & Budget Concerns
BUDGET.description: Concerns or questions about cost, pricing, fees, expensive subscriptions, or discount requests.

TIMELINE.label: Timeline, Scheduling & Onboarding Speed
TIMELINE.description: Concerns or questions about implementation timeline, onboarding speed, scheduling, class timing, or launch delays.

SWITCHING.label: Switching Providers & Contract Lock-in
SWITCHING.description: Friction or questions about migrating from a current provider, switching career tracks, or vendor lock-in contracts.

COMPETITOR.label: Competitor Mentioned
COMPETITOR.description: Mention of competitor platforms or schools (Salesforce, HubSpot, Masai School, Scaler, Coding Ninjas, etc.).

BUY_SIGNAL.label: Buying Signal / Next Steps
BUY_SIGNAL.description: Asks for next steps, scheduling, booking a session, taking a free aptitude/scholarship test, or explicitly agreeing to a Rep's direct next-step proposal.

guidelineText.saas: Instruct the Rep to suggest setting up a 15-minute trial onboarding sandbox next Tuesday to let the customer test it directly.

INQUIRY.label: Product / General Inquiry
INQUIRY.description: Standard product, course, curriculum, syllabus, or general questions.

FEES.label: Fees, Financing & Scholarships
FEES.description: Concerns or questions about course fees, ISA terms, loan EMIs, payment structures, or scholarship details (Newton School context).

PLACEMENT.label: Job Placements, CTC & Career Support
PLACEMENT.description: Concerns or questions about job placement support, CTC packages, LPA expectations, or partner networks (Newton School context).

DEGREE.label: Degree Accreditation & Rishihood University Affiliation
DEGREE.description: Concerns or questions about degree credibility, UGC approval, or Rishihood University affiliation (Newton School context).

guidelineText.newtonschool: Newton School of Technology B.Tech CS & AI is fully UGC-recognized through Rishihood University, ensuring standard academic accreditation.

CLIENT_PROFILE.label: Client Profile & Company Context
CLIENT_PROFILE.description: Questions or comments about Hearthline's brand profile, Shopify, GA4, HubSpot, Northbeam, team size (30 or 300), DTC products (sleep, kitchen, small-space), workflow, CAC, or merchandising.

NONE.label: No Specific Objection / Topic
NONE.description: General backchanneling/agreement (e.g. "yeah" when Rep is talking), small talk, basic greetings, or neutral identification checks.
